hero.description: Mounjaro helps reduce appetite and "food noise" over time. Get a doctor-guided plan that fits your body and your lifestyle.

howItWorks.subtitle: Dual-hormone targeting to help you achieve sustainable results
howItWorks.item1Desc: Reduces constant thoughts about food and cravings
howItWorks.item2Desc: Slows stomach emptying for longer satiety
howItWorks.item3Desc: Dual GIP and GLP-1 activation for better results

eligibility.criteria3Sub: Despite serious effort and lifestyle changes
eligibility.contra1: Personal or family history of medullary thyroid carcinoma (MTC)
eligibility.contraNote: Your plan should always be doctor-led. No shortcuts.

journey.subtitle: What to expect at each stage of your treatment
journey.stage1Desc: Subtle appetite changes, reduced mindless snacking
journey.stage2Desc: Noticeable body changes, smaller portions feel enough
journey.stage3Desc: Significant weight loss, better health markers

sideEffects.tip4: Prioritize protein early in the day
sideEffects.safetyDesc: GLP-1 medicines can slow stomach emptying. Regulators highlight aspiration risk during general anesthesia or deep sedation.
sideEffects.procedureTitle: If you have a procedure coming up:
sideEffects.procedureTip1: Tell your doctor and anesthetist early
sideEffects.procedureTip2: Follow medical instructions on pausing or prep
sideEffects.emergencyNote: If vomiting is severe, pain is strong, or symptoms feel scary, do not "push through." Contact your clinician.

comparison.title: Mounjaro vs Alternatives
comparison.subtitle: Understanding the differences in GLP-1 treatments

faq.q1: Is Mounjaro approved for weight loss?
faq.a1: In the US, Mounjaro is approved for type 2 diabetes, while tirzepatide is approved for chronic weight management under the brand Zepbound. Local indications can differ by country, so your KL doctor should guide you.
faq.q2: How much weight can you lose on Mounjaro?
faq.a2: In obesity trials with tirzepatide, many people lost a meaningful percentage of body weight over about 72 weeks. Your result depends on dose tolerance, lifestyle, and health factors.
faq.q3: How fast does Mounjaro start working for weight loss?
faq.a3: Many people notice appetite changes in the first few weeks. Visible body changes often take 8 to 12 weeks, and keep building with time and consistency.
faq.q4: What happens when you stop Mounjaro?
faq.a4: Many people regain some weight if lifestyle habits are not supported. That is why a long-term plan matters, including nutrition, activity, sleep, and follow-up.
faq.q5: How much does Mounjaro cost in Malaysia?
faq.a5: Cost depends on dose and clinic support. Some Malaysia listings show around RM 1,150 for certain strengths, while other providers list higher ranges. Your total cost may include consults, labs, and follow-ups.

cta.description: The safest first step is a proper medical consult. We'll help you understand eligibility, expected results, side effects, and a plan you can actually follow.
